since_last: 57% of 99 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.16%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.49% · Gold -0.38% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 57% of 99 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.16%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.16%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: UEC is the standout at +3.84%
cards.body: Leaders: UEC +3.84%, META +3.76%, PATH +2.29%, NOW +2.20%, BABA +1.89%. Laggards: INTC -2.47%, LRCX -2.47%, MU -2.46%, AMAT -2.41%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.07% at $152.27
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.07% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
